name: Kimi Code
description: Moonshot AI Kimi K2.6 via the platform.moonshot.ai OpenAI-compatible API. Contributes both chat and agent providers. Requires a Moonshot API key.
author: Nimbalyst

minMoonshotApiVersion.description: Minimum Moonshot platform API version this extension targets. Bumped via extension update without a Nimbalyst release. Mirrors the antigravity IDE version-pin pattern (Greg, issue #96).

marketplace.tagline: Moonshot Kimi K2.6 in chat and agent providers
marketplace.longDescription: Adds two providers to Nimbalyst that talk to Moonshot's Kimi K2.6 model through the OpenAI-compatible platform.moonshot.ai API. A chat provider for one-shot prompts and an agent provider with tool-loop support and meta-agent host mode (Kimi K2.6 can spawn Claude or Codex child sessions mid-loop). Requires a Moonshot API key, entered once in the settings panel and stored in the local electron-store; no environment variable fallback. The default model is kimi-k2.6 (256K context); kimi-k2-thinking and kimi-k2.5 are also surfaced for reasoning and compatibility workflows.
highlights: Moonshot Kimi K2.6 chat provider with 256K context window
Agent provider with tool-loop and meta-agent host mode
Spawn Claude or Codex child sessions from a Kimi agent loop
API key entered once in the settings panel - no env fallback, no key leakage
OpenAI-compatible request shape; works against api.moonshot.ai/v1
